response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior individual contributor with ~14 years of broad full-stack experience, but the resume shows no executive or technical leadership roles, no evidence of scaling engineering organizations from 10 to 30+, and only peripheral exposure to agentic AI (contributing to MCP tooling at re:cinq since 2025). There is no demonstrated production multi-agent system ownership, no fintech-infrastructure architecture leadership, and no track record operating regulated AI systems — all hard requirements for this CTO role. The profile is several seniority tiers below what the role demands.
strengths: 14+ years of polyglot full-stack and distributed-systems experience
Brief recent exposure to agentic AI tooling (MCP) and prior fintech work at RIDE Capital
Strong engineering craftsmanship background: TDD, CI/CD, open-source maintainership
concerns: No executive, VP, or head-of-engineering roles — entire career is IC (Software Developer / Staff Engineer)
No evidence of building or operating production multi-agent AI systems at scale
No track record of hiring, scaling teams (10→30+), or governing outsourced engineering partners

key_factors.factor: No production multi-agent AI systems ownership
